entries.label: chrome-window-incognito
entries.source: Google Chrome 150.0.7871.115 (native-local, macOS, isolated --user-data-dir profile, incognito window), apple.com/wikipedia.org neutral tabs
entries.note: Incognito window chrome variant: dark tab strip/toolbar, incognito glasses badge on favicon + traffic-light area, 'Incognito' pill in toolbar, no profile avatar, no bookmarks bar. Dark-chrome ground truth independent of macOS system appearance.
entries.assetDecision: Ground-truth reference of the real application for fidelity work — recreate the surface as closely as possible from it. Logged-in captures may contain the owner's private content; keep those local and use synthetic demo content in tracked surfaces.

entries.label: chrome-window-light
entries.source: Google Chrome 150.0.7871.115 (native-local, macOS, isolated --user-data-dir profile — no user data/history/logins), apple.com/wikipedia.org/nytimes.com neutral tabs
entries.note: Full chrome window: traffic lights, tab strip with 3 tabs (favicons + close buttons), omnibox with site-info icon/star/profile/menu, link-preview status bar on hover. Light appearance, no bookmarks bar, no profile signed in. Captured in a throwaway isolated profile to avoid touching the owner's real browsing session.
entries.assetDecision: Ground-truth reference of the real application for fidelity work — recreate the surface as closely as possible from it. Logged-in captures may contain the owner's private content; keep those local and use synthetic demo content in tracked surfaces.
